Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

If you need to add a sub item of Service Menu, please explain the necessity. Or the codes will not be merged.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> If you need to add a sub item of Service Menu, please explain the necessity. Or the codes will not be merged.

> > Network Topology was directly taking us to the CCVPN-network page. This page was specifically to create and maintain links for CCVPN. We had a requirement to create inter-domain links and the right place to put it is under network topology. Therefore I had to create a common network section and push CCVPN in as well as add our new MDONS component there. It also paves way for adding any future network topology features under that sub-menu. Please let me know if you have any more questions.

> > > Network Topology was directly taking us to the CCVPN-network page. This page was specifically to create and maintain links for CCVPN. We had a requirement to create inter-domain links and the right place to put it is under network topology. Therefore I had to create a common network section and push CCVPN in as well as add our new MDONS component there. It also paves way for adding any future network topology features under that sub-menu. Please let me know if you have any more questions.

> > > Also the sub item has been added to the Network Topology menu and not the service menu.
